mapper.select: SELECT b.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, b.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, b.BOARD_CATEGORY AS boardCategory, b.BOARD_TITLE AS boardTitle, b.BOARD_THUMB AS boardThumb, COUNT(l.BOARD_NO) AS likeCount FROM BOARD_TBL b LEFT JOIN BOARD_LIKE_TBL l ON b.BOARD_NO = l.BOARD_NO WHERE b.BOARD_CATEGORY = 1 AND b.BOARD_STATUS = 1 GROUP BY b.BOARD_NO ORDER BY likeCount DESC, b.BOARD_DATE DESC LIMIT 6
